name_he: הרשות השופטת - אתר בתי המשפט
name_en: The Israeli Judiciary (Judicial Authority) - Courts Website
historical_coverage: portal itself is current; links to decision databases
auth_required: no for public pages; gov ID login for filing/case access
legal_risk: low for metadata; privacy considerations for party names
recommended_ingestion: use as entry point/link hub; ingest decisions via Net HaMishpat publication channels
example_documents: homepage lists e-filing, case search, decisions publication notices
notes: Root redirects into the NGCS (Net HaMishpat) web portal. Site states judgments and decisions are published to the public on the website within 72 hours of release.

name_he: נט המשפט - פורטל הציבור (עיון בתיקים ופרסום החלטות)
name_en: Net HaMishpat public portal (case inquiry and decision publication)
access: free web; some functions need government SSO login
historical_coverage: electronic case files roughly since 2010s; published decisions ongoing
metadata_availability: high (case number, court, judge, parties, dates)
auth_required: no for public decision search; yes (gov ID) for full case file access
captcha: reported by practitioners for some queries; unconfirmed
update_frequency: continuous (decisions published within 72 hours per site notice)
legal_risk: medium - court files contain personal data; publication rules (privacy redaction) apply
recommended_ingestion: primary official channel for new district/magistrates/labor decisions; scrape published-decisions section respectfully or obtain data-sharing agreement with the Judicial Authority
example_documents: public decision search results; small-claims e-filing service
notes: This is THE authoritative distribution point for trial-court decisions. Homepage fetched successfully and confirms public decision publication within 72 hours.

name_he: מאגר פסקי הדין וההחלטות של בית המשפט העליון
name_en: Supreme Court of Israel decisions database (supremedecisions)
historical_coverage: digital full-text approximately from 1997 onward; selected older and English-translated judgments
metadata_availability: high (case number, parties, justices, dates, proceeding type)
api_available: no documented API; undocumented JSON endpoints observed (e.g. /data/HomePage/GetSelectedJudjment?Lang=2) and direct file download URLs (/Home/Download?path=...)
bulk_download: no official bulk; deterministic download URL pattern enables systematic retrieval
robots_policy: robots.txt intermittently unreachable from research environment
hebrew_quality: native Hebrew, high; English subset professionally translated
legal_risk: low - Supreme Court decisions are core public law material
technical_difficulty: medium (structured download URLs; search is JS-driven)
recommended_ingestion: highest-value single corpus; harvest via search + /Home/Download file pattern (HebrewVerdicts/EnglishVerdicts paths), store TXT/DOC plus metadata
example_documents: HCJ 1181/03 English verdict via /Home/Download?path=EnglishVerdicts/03/810/011/r23; RCA 2575/18 Hebrew verdict
notes: Root page fetched successfully showing bilingual search with date/case filters. Download endpoint pattern verified via multiple live document URLs surfaced in search results.

name_he: אתר בית המשפט העליון
name_en: Supreme Court of Israel official website
historical_coverage: unknown
recommended_ingestion: use for court metadata and advanced-search entry point; actual documents come from supremedecisions.court.gov.il
example_documents: fullsearch.aspx advanced search page; /sites/en/Pages/home.aspx English homepage (seen in search results)
notes: fetch blocked from research environment (robots.txt read errors on two attempts, two different pages). Existence and structure confirmed via search results and cross-links.

name_he: פסקי דין והחלטות שהופצו על ידי מערך הדוברות - הרשות השופטת
name_en: Judgments and decisions distributed by the Judiciary Spokesperson unit (gov.il collector)
subcategory: district, magistrates, labor and administrative courts - selected decisions
historical_coverage: approximately from 2018-2019 judicial year onward (per cross-reference on labor_court_verdicts page)
metadata_availability: high (court, judge, date, case number filters typical of gov.il collectors)
api_available: gov.il dynamic collectors are backed by an internal JSON API (not officially documented)
terms_status: unknown (gov.il general terms apply; not reviewed on-page)
recommended_ingestion: ingest as curated official stream of significant trial-court decisions; complements Net HaMishpat full stream
example_documents: unknown
notes: fetch blocked from research environment (HTTP 403 from gov.il on two attempts). Page existence, title and purpose confirmed via multiple independent search results and cross-links from other verified gov.il pages.

name_he: מאגר פסקי דין - היחידה לחופש המידע (data.gov.il)
name_en: Judgments dataset - Freedom of Information Unit, data.gov.il
publisher: משרד המשפטים (Ministry of Justice) on data.gov.il
historical_coverage: 2021 only (district and magistrates court decisions sample)
content_types: structured table of judgments: case numbers, parties, judges, summaries
api_type: CKAN REST API (package_show / datastore) - verified working
rag_permission: likely permitted for reuse (open license) - confirm exact license text
recommended_ingestion: one-off ingest; small 2021 sample only - useful for schema design, not a live corpus
example_documents: CSV resource at e.data.gov.il/dataset/b6fcb3eb-.../download/csv_-_-.csv; PDF opening instructions
notes: Verified via CKAN API JSON. Contact: yehudakat@justice.gov.il. data.gov.il CKAN API is the general gateway to all government legal datasets.

name_he: פורטל בתי הדין - משרד המשפטים (UniCourt)
name_en: Ministry of Justice tribunals portal (unicourt.justice.gov.il)
subcategory: special tribunals aggregator (Sharia courts, Druze religious courts, traffic tribunal, land-registration supervisors and more)
historical_coverage: unknown
full_text: yes (judgment pages per category, e.g. /judgments/3 for traffic tribunal)
hebrew_quality: native Hebrew (some Arabic for Sharia courts likely)
legal_risk: medium - religious/family tribunal decisions carry privacy sensitivity
recommended_ingestion: ingest per-tribunal judgment sections (categories 1,2,3,7); covers tribunals absent from Net HaMishpat
example_documents: unicourt.justice.gov.il/judgments/3 (traffic tribunal); /category/7/7 (land registration supervisors); /category/1/1 (Sharia courts)
notes: fetch blocked from research environment (robots.txt fetch failed on two attempts). Structure and category URLs confirmed via multiple search results.

name_he: פסקי דין - בתי הדין הרבניים (gov.il)
name_en: Rabbinical Courts published rulings database (gov.il collector)
publisher: הנהלת בתי הדין הרבניים (Rabbinical Courts Administration)
historical_coverage: multi-year archive; exact span unknown (page shows placeholder update dates)
metadata_availability: high (court, dayan/judge, subject, sub-category, date, case number, representatives)
api_available: gov.il dynamic collectors backed by undocumented JSON API
update_frequency: ongoing; page-level 'last update' field shows placeholder (01.01.0001) data error
hebrew_quality: native Hebrew with rabbinic/halachic terminology, high
legal_risk: medium - family-law privacy; rulings are published anonymized
recommended_ingestion: ingest full collector with metadata facets; key corpus for family/halachic law
example_documents: search result rows with court, dayanim, date, case number and downloadable ruling files
notes: Fetched successfully; rich filter set confirmed (ruling name, court, subject, judge, date range, case number, summary, representatives).

name_he: אתר פסקי דין רבניים (מכון פסקים)
name_en: Psakim.org - rabbinical monetary-law rulings archive
publisher: מכון פסקים (Machon Psakim, registered nonprofit, est. 2016)
primary_or_secondary: primary (publishes rulings of private batei din)
historical_coverage: 2016 onward mainly; ~2,520 rulings at time of check
rag_permission: unknown - nonprofit mission is public accessibility; ask permission
recommended_ingestion: contact nonprofit for cooperation; valuable niche corpus for Jewish monetary law
example_documents: SimpleSearch and Tags pages listing 2,520 rulings
notes: Covers private/communal batei din ruling by Torah law - complements the state rabbinical courts collector.

name_he: פסקי דין של בתי הדין הרבניים בישראל (פד"ר) - אתר דעת
name_en: Digitized Rabbinical Courts reports (PDR volumes) on Daat
publisher: אתר דעת - מכללת הרצוג (Daat, Herzog College)
historical_coverage: PDR volumes from the 1950s-1990s (print-era official reports)
recommended_ingestion: optional historical backfill for rabbinical case law before the gov.il database era
example_documents: PDR volume pages listed in search results (daat.ac.il/mishpat-ivri/piskey.htm)
notes: fetch blocked from research environment (WebFetch proxy rate limit 429 at time of attempt). URL and content type confirmed via search results only.

name_he: פסקי דין ייחודיים של בתי הדין לעבודה מתורגמים לאנגלית (gov.il)
name_en: Selected Labor Court judgments translated to English (gov.il collector)
historical_coverage: selected judgments; links to full spokesperson stream from 2018-2019 judicial year onward
metadata_availability: high (court, district, judge/panel, decision date, case name filters)
hebrew_quality: bilingual - professional English translations of Hebrew originals
recommended_ingestion: small curated bilingual corpus - useful for alignment/translation tasks; bulk labor case law should come from Net HaMishpat/spokesperson channel
example_documents: English-translated National Labor Court rulings with filter facets
notes: Labor courts have no separate decisions database - full stream flows through Net HaMishpat and the spokesperson gov.il collector.

name_he: פסקי דין - המפקחים על רישום מקרקעין (gov.il)
name_en: Judgments of the Supervisors of Land Registration (condominium disputes)
publisher: הרשות לרישום והסדר זכויות מקרקעין, משרד המשפטים
historical_coverage: verdicts uploaded before and after 2021; pre-2021 records searchable only by office, supervisor, date and free text
metadata_availability: high (case number, office, supervisor, block/plot, municipality, parties, representatives, date range)
recommended_ingestion: ingest full collector - unique real-estate tribunal corpus with excellent structured metadata (block/plot facets)
example_documents: search results with block/plot, supervisor, parties and downloadable verdicts
notes: Appeals from supervisors also appear on unicourt.justice.gov.il category 7 and in district-court channels.

name_he: החלטות רשם הפטנטים, המדגמים וסימני המסחר (gov.il)
name_en: Israel Patent Office registrar decisions database
publisher: רשות הפטנטים (Israel Patent Office), משרד המשפטים
subcategory: IP tribunal (patents, trademarks, designs registrar decisions)
historical_coverage: unknown
content_types: registrar decisions in oppositions, cancellations, extensions, hearings
recommended_ingestion: ingest collector; pair with trademarks.justice.gov.il register for entity linking
example_documents: unknown
notes: fetch blocked from research environment (HTTP 403 on Hebrew URL, 404 on English variant). Existence confirmed by gov.il search result title 'החלטות רשם | רשות הפטנטים' and practitioner sites referencing the database.

name_he: מאגר המידע של רשות התחרות (כולל החלטות בית הדין לתחרות)
name_en: Israel Competition Authority database (incl. Competition Tribunal matters)
historical_coverage: unknown (authority publications go back decades; database span unconfirmed)
metadata_availability: medium (primary subject, secondary subject, decision type, number, title)
recommended_ingestion: ingest collector by decision type; Competition Tribunal (בית הדין לתחרות) court rulings themselves also flow via district-court channels (Jerusalem District)
example_documents: search interface with subject/decision-type/number/title filters (page fetched, client-side rendered)
notes: Page fetched but Angular template only partially rendered; filter fields confirmed. Whether tribunal judgments vs only authority decisions are included needs confirmation during ingestion.

name_he: מבא"ת - מידע תכנוני: החלטות ועדות ערר לתכנון ובנייה
name_en: Mavat national planning portal - planning appeal committee decisions/protocols
historical_coverage: unknown (plan documents go back decades; appeal decisions span unconfirmed)
recommended_ingestion: target the meetings/decisions search entity for appeal committees; heavy SPA scraping effort
example_documents: SV3 searchEntity=3 meetings/decisions search (seen in search results)
notes: fetch blocked from research environment (robots.txt connect timeout on two attempts). Portal existence and decision-search function confirmed via search results and Knesset research center report.

name_he: ועדות ערר בסמכות בתי המשפט המחוזיים (כולל ועדות ערר מיסוי מקרקעין)
name_en: Appeal committees under district courts (incl. real-estate tax appeal committees)
historical_coverage: unknown
content_types: committee information; decisions published via court channels
full_text: no dedicated decisions database identified - decisions flow through Net HaMishpat and commercial databases
recommended_ingestion: no direct ingestion; capture tax-appeal-committee decisions via Net HaMishpat stream (they sit within district courts)
example_documents: unknown
notes: Page fetched but body did not render (only meta tags returned). No standalone public database of tax appeal committee decisions was found in research; practitioners confirm publication via court system and commercial aggregators.

name_he: פדאור אתיקה - מאגר החלטות ועדות האתיקה ובתי הדין המשמעתיים של לשכת עורכי הדין
name_en: Israel Bar Association ethics and disciplinary decisions (Pador Etika free access)
publisher: לשכת עורכי הדין בישראל (Israel Bar Association) with Pador
subcategory: attorney ethics opinions and disciplinary tribunal decisions
access: free access announced (Pador Etika 'free'), possibly registration-gated
commercial: platform operated with commercial vendor (Pador/LawData ecosystem)
historical_coverage: unknown
stability: medium (israelbar.org.il is JS-gated legacy ASP site)
legal_risk: medium - disciplinary decisions involve named attorneys; anonymization rules vary
recommended_ingestion: approach the Bar Association for licensed data access; National Ethics Committee decisions also mirrored on Nevo
example_documents: district ethics pages (e.g. tabar.org.il/ethica - fetched successfully) point to the national committee's decisions database
notes: fetch blocked from research environment (israelbar.org.il returns JS-required redirect page). Tel Aviv district ethics page (tabar.org.il/ethica) fetched successfully and confirms national decisions database exists. Nevo hosts a mirror folder of Bar ethics committee decisions.

name_he: פסקי דין והחלטות - בתי הדין הצבאיים (צה"ל)
name_en: IDF Military Courts - published judgments and decisions
publisher: יחידת בתי הדין הצבאיים, צה"ל (IDF Military Courts Unit)
historical_coverage: unknown (selected published decisions)
recommended_ingestion: low-volume selective ingestion if military law is in scope; West Bank military courts publications are separate (National Library holds 'selected judgments' periodical)
example_documents: idf.il section pages 'פסקי דין והחלטות' and category 'פסקי דין: אחר' (from search results)
notes: fetch blocked from research environment (WebFetch proxy HTTP 429 on two attempts). Existence of the judgments section confirmed via multiple idf.il URLs in search results.

name_he: פסקי דין - בתי הדין השרעיים (gov.il)
name_en: Sharia Courts published rulings database (gov.il collector)
historical_coverage: unknown
full_text: unknown (likely downloadable documents as in sibling collectors)
recommended_ingestion: ingest alongside rabbinical collector for religious-courts coverage; also accessible via unicourt.justice.gov.il category 1
example_documents: unknown
notes: fetch blocked from research environment (WebFetch proxy HTTP 429 at time of attempt). URL and title 'פסקי דין – בתי הדין השרעיים' confirmed via gov.il search result.

name_he: נבו - המאגר המשפטי הישראלי
name_en: Nevo legal database
publisher: נבו הוצאה לאור בע"מ (Nevo Publishing Ltd)
access: subscription; some free content (statutes, selected files)
historical_coverage: claims ~90% of Israeli court decisions; Supreme Court back to state's founding, plus rabbinical, military, disciplinary tribunals
api_available: no public API; enterprise integrations by agreement
terms_status: proprietary terms of use (not reviewed in full)
rag_permission: requires commercial license - scraping prohibited by standard terms
hebrew_quality: native Hebrew, editorially curated, highest quality
legal_risk: high if scraped; low if licensed
recommended_ingestion: negotiate commercial data license; de-facto standard used by 90% of judges and prosecutors per government survey quoted on site
example_documents: homepage confirming coverage of Supreme/district/magistrates, rabbinical, military, disciplinary decisions
notes: Most complete Israeli case-law corpus in existence; key benchmark for coverage.

name_he: תקדין
name_en: Takdin legal database
access: freemium - free snippets, paid full access
historical_coverage: decades of Israeli case law (exact span unknown)
feeds: smart-agent email alerts on saved searches
recommended_ingestion: alternative licensing candidate to Nevo
example_documents: homepage listing rulings, legislation, Nezeklik and traffic sub-databases
notes: Free tier exposes ruling snippets widely indexed by Google.

name_he: Lawdata דטה חוק ומשפט
name_en: Lawdata legal database
historical_coverage: broad Israeli case-law and legislation archive; span unknown
recommended_ingestion: licensing candidate; also operates Pador ecosystem relevant to Bar ethics decisions
example_documents: homepage with July 2026 case updates and AI legal search

name_he: פסקדין
name_en: PsakDin legal portal
subcategory: free/freemium case-law portal and legal content site
access: free search of thousands of rulings; premium features
historical_coverage: thousands of rulings; span unknown
recommended_ingestion: use raw rulings from official sources instead; PsakDin value is editorial layer which needs permission
example_documents: Court search page /Court; practice-area case summaries

name_he: judgments.org.il - המאגר המשפטי החופשי
name_en: Judgments.org.il free case-law database
subcategory: free aggregator of court decisions (all instances)
historical_coverage: claims 4M+ decisions across 560 proceeding types, all court levels
terms_status: site disclaimer seen; full terms not reviewed
license_status: unknown (underlying decisions are public; site compilation rights unclear)
stability: medium (private project; similar sites have faced takedown/privacy pressure)
legal_risk: medium-high - Israeli privacy/erasure disputes around republished judgments; verify provenance before reuse
recommended_ingestion: useful for gap-filling and volume benchmarking; prefer official channels for canonical ingestion
example_documents: homepage stats: 4M+ decisions, 1,832 judges, 67,876 attorneys
notes: Justifies access on the open-justice principle (פומביות הדיון); operator anonymous.

name_he: verdicts.co.il - החלטות ופסקי דין פליליים
name_en: Verdicts.co.il free criminal decisions repository
historical_coverage: unknown; recent entries include magistrate, district and supreme court criminal matters
terms_status: disclaimer seen; full terms not reviewed
recommended_ingestion: not recommended as canonical source; criminal decisions better taken from official channels with redaction compliance
example_documents: recent traffic (תת"ע) and criminal (ת"פ) case pages on homepage

name_he: תולעת המשפט
name_en: Tolaat HaMishpat (court-case metadata and decisions search)
subcategory: free case-file metadata and decisions search
historical_coverage: unknown; reputedly indexes large volumes of Net HaMishpat case metadata
stability: low-medium (privacy-takedown litigation pressure documented in Israeli media)
legal_risk: high - repeated privacy/right-to-be-forgotten controversies over party-name indexing
recommended_ingestion: do not ingest; monitor as a market/coverage reference only
example_documents: search page 'חיפוש' (IDN URL xn----8hcborozt8bdd.xn--9dbq2a)
notes: fetch blocked from research environment (fetcher cannot encode IDN robots.txt - ascii codec error). Existence confirmed via search results including reputation-management articles about removing content from it.

name_he: מאגר פסיקת בית המשפט העליון - האוניברסיטה העברית (ISCD)
name_en: The Israeli Supreme Court Database (Hebrew University)
publisher: האוניברסיטה העברית בירושלים (Hebrew University of Jerusalem)
subcategory: academic structured dataset of Supreme Court cases
historical_coverage: systematically coded Supreme Court case data (multi-decade; exact span unconfirmed)
recommended_ingestion: excellent metadata enrichment layer over the supremedecisions corpus (outcomes, panel composition)
example_documents: unknown
notes: fetch blocked from research environment (robots.txt fetch failures on two attempts). Project existence confirmed via Harvard Library research guide and direct search result 'Home | The Israeli Supreme Court Database'.

name_he: מאגר בתי משפט ובתי דין - data.gov.il (CKAN API)
name_en: data.gov.il CKAN platform - courts/judgments datasets gateway
publisher: רשות התקשוב / ממשל זמין (Israel National Digital Agency)
subcategory: open-data API gateway for judicial datasets
historical_coverage: dataset-dependent (e.g. judgments dataset = 2021; court-lost dataset = courts directory)
api_type: CKAN REST API v3 (package_search, package_show, datastore_search) - verified working from this environment
terms_status: platform terms not reviewed; per-dataset license fields present
rag_permission: generally permissive for open datasets - verify per dataset
recommended_ingestion: poll package_search for tags 'פסקי דין' to auto-discover new judicial datasets
example_documents: package_show JSON for 'judgments' dataset returned full metadata including resources and license
notes: The CKAN API is the only fully verified programmatic API found across all Israeli judicial sources in this research.
